tasks.title: Centralize 802 hardcoded Cloud Run/API URLs to env config
tasks.description: 802 hardcoded Cloud Run (.run.app) and API URLs scattered across source. Move to shared/config/endpoints.js with process.env overrides. Prevents stale URLs when services redeploy to new regions or projects

tasks.title: Deduplicate shared utilities (logger ×31, rate-limiter ×94, security-headers ×36)
tasks.description: Critical code duplication: logger.js has 31 copies, rate-limiter has 94 copies, security-headers has 36 copies, env-validator has 28 copies, error-handler has 13 copies. Consolidate to single source in shared/ and import everywhere. Prevents drift when patching security utilities
